command_summary: pi non-interactive run with no tools and the source design-craft skill explicitly loaded

style_authority.note: Recognized the calm utility context and the causal purpose of sheet motion.

reference_selection.note: Applied direct-manipulation, interruption, velocity, boundary, and Reduced Motion concepts.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Removed broad transition behavior instead of adding decorative animation.

evidence_level.note: Clearly labeled the evidence as static and runtime behavior as unverified.

verified_boundary.note: Did not claim measured frame rate, touch response, or browser state.

design_moves.note: Useful direction, but some suggestions still retained top-based transitions and imprecise interruption state handling.

scope_control.note: Stayed scoped to the sheet motion interaction and validation.
